mnemonics.title: SWM Rules Key Points
mnemonics.content: Remember with: 'DATES' - Duties of generators, Applicability to all areas, Transfer stations 24hr limit, EPR for producers, Segregation into 3 categories

acronyms.usage: Refers to the systematic collection, transport, processing, and disposal of solid waste
Policy approach making producers responsible for end-of-life management of their products
Fuel produced from processed municipal solid waste for energy recovery
Quality standards for compost and fertilizers in India
Municipal corporation, municipality, or council responsible for urban governance
Waste from construction, demolition, and renovation activities

visualTips.visualization: Think of a pyramid with Reduce at top (most preferred), then Reuse, Recycle, Recovery, and Dispose at bottom (least preferred)
Picture 3 colored bins: GREEN for wet/biodegradable, BLUE for dry/recyclable, BLACK/YELLOW for hazardous
Imagine 500 meters as approximately 5 football fields laid end to end from the nearest house

analogies.analogy: Like a car manufacturer being responsible for disposing of the car at the end of its life, not just selling it
Like sorting laundry into whites, colors, and delicates before washing - makes processing easier and more effective
Like a railway goods yard where cargo from small trucks is loaded onto larger trains for long-distance transport
Like a cow's stomach where grass is digested by bacteria to produce biogas and manure
